mountains.name: Sleeping Bear Cub
mountains.desc: A small, brown bear cub curled up and sleeping near its parent.

mountains.name: Red Berry Cluster
mountains.desc: A small cluster of red berries on a green bush.

mountains.name: Smiling Cloud
mountains.desc: A fluffy white cloud with a cute, smiling face.

mountains.name: Ladybug
mountains.desc: A tiny red ladybug with black spots on a leaf or rock.

mountains.name: Small Blue Flower
mountains.desc: A small flower with vibrant blue petals and a yellow center.

mountains.name: Brown Squirrel
mountains.desc: A small, bushy-tailed brown squirrel perched on a rock.

mountains.name: Tiny Drone
mountains.desc: A small, white quadcopter drone hovering near the river.

mountains.name: Orange Moth
mountains.desc: A small moth with orange wings and black markings on a log.

mountains.name: Compass
mountains.desc: A small, round golden compass with a needle pointing north.

mountains.name: First-Aid Kit
mountains.desc: A compact red first-aid kit with a white cross symbol.

mountains.name: Canteen
mountains.desc: A green or blue metal canteen with a strap, often used for water.

mountains.name: Pocket Knife
mountains.desc: A small, folded pocket knife with a wooden handle.

mountains.name: Marshmallow on Stick
mountains.desc: A white marshmallow toasted golden brown on the end of a wooden stick.

mountains.name: Bird's Nest
mountains.desc: A small bird's nest woven from twigs and leaves, perhaps with tiny eggs.

mountains.name: Fishing Lure
mountains.desc: A colorful fishing lure with a hook, designed to attract fish.

ocean.name: Diving Helmet
ocean.desc: An old, brass-colored diving helmet with a round glass viewport, slightly green with age.

ocean.name: Treasure Chest
ocean.desc: An open wooden treasure chest overflowing with gold coins and jewels, with brass accents.

ocean.name: Orange Starfish
ocean.desc: A vibrant orange starfish with five arms, textured surface.

ocean.name: Yellow Seahorse
ocean.desc: A charming seahorse with a curled tail and a ridged back, primarily yellow-orange.

ocean.name: Blue Crab
ocean.desc: A small, bright blue crab with two claws and several legs, scuttling on the seafloor.

ocean.name: Red Octopus
ocean.desc: A large, friendly-looking red octopus with prominent eyes and multiple tentacles spread out from a cave opening.

ocean.name: Pink Jellyfish
ocean.desc: A graceful jellyfish with a translucent pink bell and long, flowing purple tentacles.

ocean.name: Sea Turtle
ocean.desc: A green sea turtle with a patterned brown shell, swimming gently.

ocean.name: Ship's Wheel
ocean.desc: A classic wooden ship's wheel with six spokes and a brass center, slightly weathered.

ocean.name: Pirate Hat
ocean.desc: A black or dark brown tricorn pirate hat, slightly tattered, with a skull and crossbones emblem.

ocean.name: Message in a Bottle
ocean.desc: A clear glass bottle, corked, containing a rolled-up parchment scroll, floating gently.

ocean.name: Pearl
ocean.desc: A single, lustrous white or iridescent pearl, perfectly spherical.

ocean.name: Compass
ocean.desc: An antique brass compass with a spinning needle and a clear glass cover.

ocean.name: Mermaid's Comb
ocean.desc: An elegant comb made of polished seashell or mother-of-pearl, with decorative coral accents.

ocean.name: Toy Submarine
ocean.desc: A small, yellow cartoon-style toy submarine with a periscope and a propeller.

jungle.name: Red Macaw
jungle.desc: A brightly colored parrot with red, blue, and yellow feathers, perched on a branch.

jungle.name: Toucan
jungle.desc: A black bird with a large, distinctive yellow and black beak.

jungle.name: Leopard Cub
jungle.desc: A small, spotted feline standing near the river bank.

jungle.name: Green Iguana
jungle.desc: A green lizard with a long tail, clinging to a tree trunk.

jungle.name: Long-horned Beetle
jungle.desc: A large, dark blue beetle with prominent antennae on a log.

jungle.name: Red Hibiscus Flower
jungle.desc: A vibrant pink-red flower with a yellow center.

jungle.name: Sloth
jungle.desc: A slow-moving, furry mammal with long claws, hanging from a branch.

jungle.name: Compass
jungle.desc: A vintage brass compass with a clear glass top, pointing North.

jungle.name: Magnifying Glass
jungle.desc: An old-fashioned magnifying glass with a wooden handle.

jungle.name: Explorer's Hat
jungle.desc: A classic safari-style pith helmet, light tan color.

jungle.name: Ancient Map Scroll
jungle.desc: A rolled-up parchment scroll tied with twine, showing a treasure map.

jungle.name: Binoculars
jungle.desc: A pair of black field binoculars with a strap.

jungle.name: Water Canteen
jungle.desc: A worn metal water canteen with a canvas strap.

jungle.name: Golden Idol
jungle.desc: A small, stylized golden statue of a jungle creature.

jungle.name: Tribal Mask
jungle.desc: A colorful, carved wooden mask with stylized animal features.

space.name: Smiling Yellow Star
space.desc: A bright yellow star with a friendly smiling face, shining in the cosmic sky.

space.name: Red & White Rocket
space.desc: A small, cartoon-style rocket, red and white with an orange flame base, ready for launch.

space.name: Blue Cargo Crate 'E'
space.desc: A rectangular blue cargo crate with a large white letter 'E' on its side, made of sturdy metal.

space.name: Large Satellite Dish
space.desc: A large, silver satellite dish, round and reflective, mounted on a communication tower.

space.name: Pink Alien Pal
space.desc: A friendly, light pink alien with six tentacle-like arms, large eyes, and a wide smile, wearing a green leaf.

space.name: Planet Earth
space.desc: A vibrant blue and green globe, depicting the planet Earth with clear continents and swirling clouds.

space.name: Small Blue Spaceship
space.desc: A sleek, cartoon-style small spaceship, blue and orange with a fiery exhaust trail, flying through space.

space.name: Friendly Robot
space.desc: A small, white and grey robot companion with a round body, two wheels, and a friendly screen face, wearing a cap.

space.name: Moon Rock Sample
space.desc: A small, irregular grey moon rock, dusty and rough, collected for scientific study.

space.name: Space Helmet
space.desc: A clear, round astronaut's helmet, made of shiny glass and white plastic, with blue accents.

space.name: Alien Flora Pod
space.desc: A small, glowing plant pod containing a brightly colored, unusual alien flower with vibrant petals.

space.name: Communicator Badge
space.desc: A small, futuristic communicator badge, silver with a glowing blue light, often worn on a uniform.

space.name: Stardust Vial
space.desc: A tiny corked glass vial filled with shimmering, iridescent stardust, sparkling with cosmic energy.

space.name: Miniature Planet Model
space.desc: A small, colorful model of a stylized planet, with distinct features and rings, perfect for a desk.

space.name: Astronaut Ice Cream
space.desc: A rectangular bar of freeze-dried astronaut ice cream, Neapolitan swirl flavor, in clear packaging.

fire_station.name: Chainsaw
fire_station.desc: A red and silver chainsaw with a long blade, partially on the ground.

fire_station.name: Fire Extinguisher
fire_station.desc: A bright red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose and nozzle.

fire_station.name: Dalmatian Dog
fire_station.desc: A playful white dog with distinctive black spots, perhaps with a red collar.

fire_station.name: Firefighter Helmet
fire_station.desc: A red or yellow firefighter's helmet, with a shiny visor or brim.

fire_station.name: Hose Coil
fire_station.desc: A neatly rolled up section of red or white fire hose.

fire_station.name: Axe
fire_station.desc: A large, double-bladed axe with a red head and a sturdy wooden handle.

fire_station.name: Wrench
fire_station.desc: A silver crescent wrench lying flat on the floor.

fire_station.name: Hazmat Boot
fire_station.desc: A pair of yellow or black rubber boots, specifically designed for hazardous materials.

fire_station.name: Walkie-Talkie
fire_station.desc: A black, rugged handheld radio with a short antenna and push-to-talk button.

fire_station.name: Firefighter Badge
fire_station.desc: A shiny metallic shield-shaped badge with an emblem, like a Maltese cross.

fire_station.name: Fire Hydrant
fire_station.desc: A bright red fire hydrant, a common street fixture with multiple outlets.

fire_station.name: Megaphone
fire_station.desc: A red or black handheld cone-shaped device with a grip handle, used to amplify voice.

fire_station.name: Fire Bell
fire_station.desc: A classic, polished brass or red bell, like one found on an old fire engine.

fire_station.name: Compass
fire_station.desc: A round, metallic compass with a clear glass face and a needle pointing north.

fire_station.name: First Aid Kit
fire_station.desc: A small, rectangular red box or bag with a prominent white cross symbol on it.

dinosaur_land.name: Red Mushroom
dinosaur_land.desc: A small red mushroom with white spots, growing on the ground.

dinosaur_land.name: Blue Crystal
dinosaur_land.desc: A shimmering blue crystal shard, poking out from the ground or rock.

dinosaur_land.name: Green Frog
dinosaur_land.desc: A small, bright green frog, either on the ground or in the pond.

dinosaur_land.name: Small Fish
dinosaur_land.desc: A small, light-colored fish, swimming in the pond.

dinosaur_land.name: Brown Beetle
dinosaur_land.desc: A small, orange-brown beetle, crawling on the ground.

dinosaur_land.name: Orange Flower
dinosaur_land.desc: A large, multi-petaled orange flower with a yellow center, near the left palm tree.

dinosaur_land.name: Green Lizard
dinosaur_land.desc: A small, green lizard with black spots, blending with the foliage or rock.

dinosaur_land.name: Dragonfly
dinosaur_land.desc: A large blue dragonfly with delicate wings, resting on the ground.

dinosaur_land.name: Compass
dinosaur_land.desc: An antique brass compass with a spinning needle, pointing North.

dinosaur_land.name: Dinosaur Feather
dinosaur_land.desc: A large, colorful dinosaur feather, fallen onto the ground.

dinosaur_land.name: Amber Stone
dinosaur_land.desc: A warm, golden amber stone with a trapped insect inside.

dinosaur_land.name: Cave Painting Fragment
dinosaur_land.desc: A fragment of a rock with a simple, prehistoric cave painting.

dinosaur_land.name: Dinosaur Tooth
dinosaur_land.desc: A sharp, serrated dinosaur tooth, partially buried in the dirt.

dinosaur_land.name: Explorer's Hat
dinosaur_land.desc: A worn, beige pith helmet or safari hat.

dinosaur_land.name: Ancient Map Scroll
dinosaur_land.desc: A rolled-up parchment map, old and faded, tied with twine.

construction_site.name: Wrench
construction_site.desc: A silver-colored spanner, visible in toolboxes and on the ground.

construction_site.name: Hard Hat
construction_site.desc: A yellow safety helmet, like those worn by construction workers, one is on the ground.

construction_site.name: Traffic Cone
construction_site.desc: A bright orange safety cone, several are scattered on the ground.

construction_site.name: Red Brick
construction_site.desc: A rectangular, reddish-orange building brick, stacked in piles and individually.

construction_site.name: Concrete Pipe
construction_site.desc: A large, grey cylindrical concrete pipe, three are stacked horizontally.

construction_site.name: Shovel
construction_site.desc: A gray or silver hand shovel with a wooden handle, near the cement mixers.

construction_site.name: Blue Water Bottle
construction_site.desc: A small, transparent blue plastic bottle, two are on the ground near the tools.

construction_site.name: Open Blueprint Book
construction_site.desc: A large, colorful open book showing construction plans and diagrams, on a wooden crate.

construction_site.name: Measuring Tape
construction_site.desc: A retractable yellow measuring tape, partially extended.

construction_site.name: Clipboard
construction_site.desc: A brown clipboard with a piece of white paper and a pen.

construction_site.name: Lunch Pail
construction_site.desc: A metal or plastic lunchbox, often used by workers.

construction_site.name: Walkie-Talkie
construction_site.desc: A handheld two-way radio used for communication on a job site.

construction_site.name: Toy Crane
construction_site.desc: A miniature yellow toy crane, like the large ones in the background.

construction_site.name: Road Sign
construction_site.desc: A small, circular road sign depicting 'construction ahead' or 'men at work'.

monster_truck_jam.name: Oil Barrel
monster_truck_jam.desc: A blue, green, or rusted metal barrel, possibly dented, on the muddy track.

monster_truck_jam.name: Traffic Cone
monster_truck_jam.desc: A bright orange plastic traffic cone, some partially buried in mud.

monster_truck_jam.name: Wrench
monster_truck_jam.desc: A silver or metal wrench, lying on the ground or near tools.

monster_truck_jam.name: Gold Trophy
monster_truck_jam.desc: A shiny gold trophy with handles, on a display stand.

monster_truck_jam.name: Checkered Flag
monster_truck_jam.desc: A black and white checkered flag, either waving or on a pole.

monster_truck_jam.name: Car Door
monster_truck_jam.desc: A detached, dented car door, possibly blue or red, lying in the mud.

monster_truck_jam.name: Bird
monster_truck_jam.desc: A small dark bird flying in the light blue sky.

monster_truck_jam.name: Stacked Tires
monster_truck_jam.desc: A small stack of two or three black vehicle tires.

monster_truck_jam.name: Racing Helmet
monster_truck_jam.desc: A brightly colored racing helmet, possibly with a visor, lying on the ground.

monster_truck_jam.name: Steering Wheel
monster_truck_jam.desc: A broken or detached car steering wheel, possibly muddy.

monster_truck_jam.name: Spark Plug
monster_truck_jam.desc: A small, ceramic and metal spark plug, suitable for an engine.

monster_truck_jam.name: Monster Truck Wheel Nut
monster_truck_jam.desc: A large, heavy-duty silver or black lug nut from a monster truck tire.

monster_truck_jam.name: Gold Medal
monster_truck_jam.desc: A shiny gold circular medal with a ribbon, perhaps hidden near the trophies.

monster_truck_jam.name: Race Ticket
monster_truck_jam.desc: A torn paper ticket for entry to the monster truck rally, half-buried in mud.

monster_truck_jam.name: Mud Splatter Goggles
monster_truck_jam.desc: A pair of clear or tinted racing goggles, covered in brown mud splatters.
